SNAP!
Possessive 's Family Edition

⚡ Two decks flip cards at the same time — yours and the computer's.

🔴 The SNAP! button is always active. Press it the moment you see two cards from the same family (same number/color)!

✍️ If you're faster than the computer, write a sentence with possessive 's about the two people.

✅ Correct = +1 point. ❌ Wrong = −1 point (you get a 2nd try). ⚠️ Snap with no match = −1 point.
